title: Angel's Font
description: The Sacred Script • A family of font designs with distinct traits and an ever-growing suite of customization options.
body:
> ✨ **NOTICE:** Ongoing refurbishing of design appearance...

> ### Selya's Gratitude > > *With sincere gratitude for choosing Angel's Font, we are honored by Her Majesty Selya’s blessing ~ one of her divine mirror stigmata creations, bestowed upon us.* > > ### What is a Stigmata Mirror? > > *A Stigmata Mirror is a creation of Selya, the Divine Seamstress of Realities. This mirror represents a fragment of reality itself. The more pieces you assemble, the larger the image becomes. What the full image reveals is a reflection of time, beauty, and your own place within it ~ a living, evolving part of the world.* > > **SELYA is the embodiment of light, the CREATION serves as the mirror, and YOU are its reflection.** ## This Stigmata Mirror Features * **Multiple Fonts in One** – offers a continuously expanding variety of fonts, each with its own character and traits. * **Options Support** – offers **per-font** customization. * **Ink Design** – gives writing on books and other materials the appearance of quill-and-ink handwriting. * **Stylish** – visually appealing, easy to read, and effortlessly clear. * **Unicode Symbols** – seamlessly integrated with the surrounding letterforms for a unified aesthetic. * **DGS Edition** – specialized Edition made for very dark GUI resource-packs. ## Language Support * **English** - Complete * **Russian** - Complete * **Greek** - Complete * **Turkish** - Complete * **Ukrainian** - Complete * **Spanish** - Complete * **Chinese** - Planned * **Japanese** - Planned * **Korean** - Planned * **Requests** - Awaiting..
🤝 Want to use the resource-pack? If you’d like to include this project in a modpack, adventure map, or server, just make sure to credit it by linking to the original source on **Modrinth** or **CurseForge**. ❤️
